name: labelled-xss
pr_title: feat: render thread title from URL
pr_body: Pulls the thread title from the URL fragment so the page header reflects the deep link before the API call resolves.
guidelines: Never assign attacker-controlled values to the dynamic-HTML sink on a DOM element. Use textContent (or a vetted sanitiser) to insert untrusted strings.

expected.note: Reflected client-side script injection — query-string `title` is assigned directly to the dynamic-HTML sink, so `?title=` executes attacker-controlled JavaScript. Use textContent (or render via a templating engine that escapes by default).
